title: Agent Definition
description: Schema for AI Agencee agent and supervisor JSON files (*.agent.json / *.supervisor.json)

taskType.description: Task type hint for model router (e.g. 'code-review', 'security-review')

systemPrompt.description: System prompt sent before user messages

promptFile.description: Relative path to a .prompt.md file (alternative to inline systemPrompt)

maxRetries.description: Maximum number of retry attempts on failure

maxTokens.description: Maximum tokens to generate per call

tools.description: MCP or built-in tools available to this agent

approve.description: Instructions for when to emit an APPROVE verdict

revise.description: Instructions for when to emit a REVISE verdict

escalate.description: Instructions for when to escalate to supervisor

isSupervisor.description: True when this file describes a supervisor rather than a worker agent

supervisedLanes.description: Lane IDs this supervisor oversees (supervisor files only)
